note: PROVISIONAL bracket + best-third allocation (§2.2, §8.1 — release gate). FIFA publishes a lookup mapping the sorted set of the 8 qualifying third-place groups to specific bracket slots; until that official 2026 table is encoded, this file defines (a) a valid, documented 32-team bracket and (b) a deterministic fallback that ranks the 8 best thirds 1..8 and assigns them to the winner-vs-third slots in bracket order, swapping to avoid a third meeting its own group's winner. All predictions are flagged provisional in meta and the UI until replaced.
fold: Sequential: Round-of-16 match k is contested by the winners of Round-of-32 matches (2k-1, 2k). Matches 1-8 form the top half (Semi-final 1), matches 9-16 the bottom half (Semi-final 2). This guarantees a valid 32->16->8->4->2->1 single-elimination tree and no same-group meeting before the Round of 16.
